rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type annexes using only visible feature names and provided numeric bounds.
Use helper boolean equations to encode range constraints when referencing numeric features.
generic_rules: Guarantees should express observable outcomes using only declared, visible system features.
Boolean helper declarations improve clarity and type consistency in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'eq <name> : bool = ...' to define reusable boolean conditions in annexes.
Range constraints must use literal bounds or named constants, never unbound variables.
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without explicit output mapping.
Do not use untyped literals or implicit type conversions in boolean expressions.
